versions.version_description: All lyrics with accompanying chords. Full chord legend included. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Oa_RSwwpPaA.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[ch]Eb[/ch]      x68886
[ch]Gbdim7[/ch]  2x121x

[Intro]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
For a while there it was rough[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Gm[/ch]
But lately, I've been doin' better[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
Than the last four cold Decembers I recall[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I see my family every month[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
I found a girl my parents love[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Eb[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
She'll come and stay the night, and I   think I might have it all[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I thank God every day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Gbdim7[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]
For the girl He sent my way[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
But I know the things He gives me, He can take away[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I hold you every night[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Gm[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
And that's a feeling I wanna get used to[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Cm[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
But there's no man as terrified as the man who stands to lose you[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Gm[/ch]
Oh, I hope I don't losе you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Mm   please   stay[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Gm[/ch]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]
I want you, I need you, oh God[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Don't    take[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]Eb[/ch]
Thеse beautiful things that I've got[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Gm[/ch]
Please   stay[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]
I want you, I need you, oh God[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Don't    take[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]Eb[/ch]
Thеse beautiful things that I've got[/tab]

[tab][Post-Chorus]
         [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh, oh, oh-oh-oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Please    don't take[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
I found my mind, I'm feelin' sane[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]Gm[/ch]
It's been a while, but I'm finding my faith[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Eb[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
If everything's good and it's great, why do I sit and wait 'til it's gone?[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, I'll tell ya, I know I've got enough[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Gbdim7[/ch]   [ch]Gm[/ch]
I've got peace and I've got love[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
But I'm up at night thinkin' I just might lose it all[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
   Please    stay[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]
I want you, I need you, oh God[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]
Don't    take[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]Eb[/ch]
Thеse beautiful things that I've got[/tab]

[tab][Post-Chorus]
         [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh, oh, oh-oh-oh[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Please    stay[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Eb[/ch]
I want you, I need you, oh God[/tab]
